title: Kudumbasametham
desc: A traditional woman desires the perfect daughter-in-law, but fate intervenes, forcing her to contend with two sisters who are complete opposites.

title: Kudumbasametham
desc: A traditional woman desires the perfect daughter-in-law, but fate intervenes, forcing her to contend with two sisters who are complete opposites.

title: Seethayanam
desc: After Aadhya's mother dies, her aunt, Janaki, becomes her sole refuge. However, Janaki struggles to support Aadhya without causing rifts within her family that disapproves of her city lifestyle.

title: Kudumbasree Sharada
desc: Shattering the shackles of her past struggles and societal norms, a single mother successfully raises her three young daughters.

title: Chembarathi
desc: Akhila feels anxious upon noticing Kalyani and Anand, yet Kalyani’s speech consoles her.

title: Durga
desc: Durga, a courageous undercover cop, strives to balance her double life, along with attempting to avenge her mother's lost honour.

title: Krishnagadha
desc: Identical twins, separated at birth, face a cruel twist when one is forced to marry into a cursed family, unknowingly sacrificing herself for her sister.

title: Ashwathi Nakshatram
desc: Vedavathi wanted to get her son married to a woman whose horoscope would continue a family tradition. However, her son marries another woman.

title: Meghasandhesham
desc: Jagath hates the father he believes abandoned him, while Pooja searches for hers. When their paths cross, a shared past sparks a journey that could heal-or shatter-their hearts.

title: Manathe Kottaram
desc: Madhavan and Chandrika, a devoted middle-class couple, nurture their children while harbouring dreams of a new home. As they navigate life's challenges, they strive to secure their daughters' futures.

title: Akale
desc: A minister's daughter longs for the love of her father, who holds a grudge against her. However, his aide's support of her leads to a series of unexpected events.

title: Kudumbasree Sharada
desc: Shattering the shackles of her past struggles and societal norms, a single mother successfully raises her three young daughters.

title: Chembarathi
desc: Kalyani, a girl hailing from a village, gets married to Anand, the son of a wealthy man. However, she finds her simple life clashing with the ambitions of her new family.

title: Durga
desc: Questioning the marriage, Poornima confronts Kiran and Durga. Afterwards, the police interrogate Pallavi regarding the murder at the resort, shocking the family.

title: Snehapoorvam Shyama
desc: After her sister flees from her wedding, the adopted daughter is forced to take her place to save the family's reputation but, things take a turn for the worse, when her sister returns.

desc: A young woman with big dreams gets married to a man from different background and culture and together, they face challenges and joys of life.
